demographics.audit_notes: Values align well with 1990 Decennial Census data for Tract 409.0. Newly added fields are sourced from the same census data where available.
Provided values are plausible linear interpolations between 1990 and 2000 census data points.
Values align well with 2000 Decennial Census data. Provided `ethnicity_white_percent` of 39% matches the non-Hispanic White population percentage.

Provided values are plausible linear interpolations between 2000 and 2010 census data points. This is the first year ACS data becomes available, but interpolation is still a reasonable approach for a midpoint.
Values align well with 2010 Decennial Census and ACS 2006-2010 5-Year Estimates.
Values are plausible and align with ACS 2011-2015 5-Year Estimates. Total population is a reasonable interpolation between 2010 and 2020 census counts.
Values align well with 2020 Decennial Census and ACS 2016-2020 5-Year Estimates.
Values are plausible estimates based on the latest available ACS data (2017-2021 and 2018-2022 releases).
Values align well with the most recent ACS 2018-2022 5-Year Estimates.
Values are plausible projections based on trends from the ACS 2018-2022 data.
Values are plausible projections based on trends from the ACS 2018-2022 data.
Values are plausible projections based on trends from the ACS 2018-2022 data.

property.audit_notes: Values align with 1990 Census. New fields estimated.
Median home value reflects market prices (e.g., Zillow) which rose faster than ACS estimates during this period. The spike is plausible for the Austin market.
Values align with market data (Zillow) and ACS 2016-2020 5-Year Estimates.
CORRECTED median_home_value from $450,000 to $480,000 to more accurately reflect the historic ~28% YoY market spike in 2021 according to Zillow data for this area.
Value reflects the peak of the market in mid-2022.
CORRECTED median_home_value from $495,000 to $440,000 to reflect the market correction seen in Zillow data through 2023.
CORRECTED median_home_value from $520,000 to $455,000. The original value represented an implausible jump; corrected value reflects a slow market recovery per Zillow data.
CORRECTED median_home_value from $545,000 to $470,000. This is a projection based on the corrected 2024 value and assumes continued modest growth.

socioeconomic.audit_notes: Values align with 1990 Census. New fields are estimated due to lack of direct sources for this year.
Values align with 2000 Census. New fields are estimated.
Plausible interpolation between 2000 and 2010 ACS data.
Values align with ACS 2006-2010 5-Year Estimates. Unemployment rate reflects post-recession peak.
Values align with the most recent ACS 2018-2022 5-Year Estimates.
Plausible projection based on trends from ACS 2022 data.
Plausible projection based on trends from ACS 2022 data.
